race_meta.race_name: Daily Profit Boosts At betmgm.co.uk Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner ribbon of sea (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Oscar Nominee with 35.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Oscar Nominee > Ribbon Of Sea, but actual result was Ribbon Of Sea (IRE) > Oscar Nominee. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
